query_name:
SELECT asceding.rnk,
       i1.i_product_name best_performing,
       i2.i_product_name worst_performing
FROM
  (SELECT *
   FROM
     (SELECT item_sk,
             rank() OVER (
                          ORDER BY rank_col ASC) rnk
      FROM
        (SELECT ss_item_sk item_sk,
                avg(ss_net_profit) rank_col
         FROM store_sales ss1
         WHERE ss_store_sk = 4
         GROUP BY ss_item_sk
         HAVING avg(ss_net_profit) > 0.9*
           (SELECT avg(ss_net_profit) rank_col
            FROM store_sales
            WHERE ss_store_sk = 4
              AND ss_addr_sk IS NULL
            GROUP BY ss_store_sk))V1)V11
   WHERE rnk < 11) asceding,
  (SELECT *
   FROM
     (SELECT item_sk,
             rank() OVER (
                          ORDER BY rank_col DESC) rnk
      FROM
        (SELECT ss_item_sk item_sk,
                avg(ss_net_profit) rank_col
         FROM store_sales ss1
         WHERE ss_store_sk = 4
         GROUP BY ss_item_sk
         HAVING avg(ss_net_profit) > 0.9*
           (SELECT avg(ss_net_profit) rank_col
            FROM store_sales
            WHERE ss_store_sk = 4
              AND ss_addr_sk IS NULL
            GROUP BY ss_store_sk))V2)V21
   WHERE rnk < 11) descending,
     item i1,
     item i2
WHERE asceding.rnk = descending.rnk
  AND i1.i_item_sk=asceding.item_sk
  AND i2.i_item_sk=descending.item_sk
ORDER BY asceding.rnk
LIMIT 100;

extra_info.Projections: RANK() OVER (ORDER BY rank_col ASC NULLS LAST)

Projections: CASE  WHEN ((#1 > 1)) THEN ("error"('More than one row returned by a subquery used as an expression - scalar subqueries can only return a single row.
Use "SET scalar_subquery_error_on_multiple_rows=false" to revert to previous behavior of returning a random row.')) ELSE #0 END

Projections: CASE  WHEN ((#1 > 1)) THEN ("error"('More than one row returned by a subquery used as an expression - scalar subqueries can only return a single row.
Use "SET scalar_subquery_error_on_multiple_rows=false" to revert to previous behavior of returning a random row.')) ELSE #0 END
